---
title: Bruno Braga Montezano
---

# Who am I?

![](self.jpg){width=15%}

I'm [Bruno B. Montezano](https://brunomontezano.github.io), a Graduate Student in Psychology
at the Catholic University of Pelotas
and Computer Technician by the Federal Institute of Education, Science and Technology of
Rio Grande do Sul (IFRS).
My primary research focuses are mood disorders and general mental health.
I approach this topic with methods from computational social science.
I also programming and working on data analysis with R and quantitative research methods.
I am an advocate for free and open source software, reproducible research and simple solutions.

[See my curriculum clicking here (currently only in portuguese).](https://brunomontezano.github.io/cv.html)

If you'd like to contact me, feel free to send me an email.
